text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: emaste

Log:
  MFC r293055: kbdmap.5: Use current names for ASCII control codes lf, ff, us

  Refer to the old names nl, np, ns as historical aliases.

  PR:		205776, 205778

Changes:
_U  stable/10/
